mapper.insert: INSERT INTO question ( class_id, question, options, answer, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{classId}, #{question}, CAST(#{options, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler} AS jsonb), #{answer}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )

INSERT INTO question ( class_id, question, options, answer, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{item.classId}, #{item.question}, CAST(#{item.options, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler} AS jsonb), #{item.answer}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM question ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM question WHERE class_id = #{classId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE question SET class_id = #{classId}, question = #{question}, options = CAST(#{options, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler} AS jsonb), answer = #{answer}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
